mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MENUS(menuName, menuPrice, menuCategory_Id) VALUES(#{menuName}, #{menuPrice}, #{menuCategoryId})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_Id FROM MENUS WHERE menuName = #{menuName} AND menuCategory_Id = #{menuCategoryId} ORDER BY menu_Id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MENUC WHERE menuCategory = #{menuCategory} AND bId = #{bId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USED(usedCount, foodMaterial_Id, menu_Id) VALUES(#{usedCount}, #{foodMaterialId}, #{menuId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName, mc.menuCategory, m.menuPrice FROM MENUS m JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY m.menuName ASC

SELECT m.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName, m.menuPrice, f.foodMaterialName, u.usedCount, f.foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialCountAll, ROUND((u.usedCount / f.foodMaterialCountAll) * f.foodMaterialPrice, 0) AS usedPrice FROM MENUS m JOIN USED u ON m.menu_Id = u.menu_Id JOIN FOODM f ON u.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE m.menu_Id = #{menuId} ORDER BY f.foodMaterialName ASC
SELECT menuCategory_Id AS menuCategoryId, menuCategory FROM MENUC WHERE bId = #{bId}
SELECT menuName FROM MENUS WHERE menuName = #{menuName}
SELECT menuCategory_Id FROM MENUC WHERE menuCategory = #{menuCategory}
